violations.text: Handwashing sink in the mens restroom is lacking signage. A sign or poster must be posted notifying food employees of handwashing. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2026

Protective shielding is not provided for the lights in the (kitchen) area. Light bulbs must be shielded, coated, or otherwise shatter-resistant in areas where there is exposed food; clean equipment, utensils, and linens; or unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2026
